price.evidence: Comer Paraguay Dec 2025 post lists four ÓGA share plates at PGY 55k, 45k, 50k and 55k; shared by two this is about PGY 102.5k before drinks. A prior Comer Paraguay menu post lists mains around PGY 70k-85k and dessert at PGY 35k. Rounded to PGY 110k per person.
